title: gilia cana subsp. cana
intro: Gilia cana subsp. cana, also known as the desert gilia, is a perennial herb in the phlox family, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects, due to the presence of iridoid glycosides. The health benefits of Gilia cana subsp. cana include relief from digestive issues, pain management, and immune system support. Gilia cana subsp. cana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for various forms of consumption and utilization of its medicinal properties.
